Google Just Changed Updates Gemini Home.

Swipe for the full breakdown.

Gemini for Home launched in early access in October 2025, and has replaced Google Assistant on Google's smart home cameras, speakers, doorbells and displays. At I/O 2026, Google expanded its Google Home Gemini built-in program to make it easier for companies to make compatible cameras and speakers.

- Here is the key detail: At I/O 2026, Google expanded its Google Home Gemini built-in program to make it easier for companies.
- The real shift here: The big component still missing from Google's larger smart home plans is the updated Google Home Speaker.
- Keep an eye on this: "By pairing the unbound flexibility of Gemini's visual intelligence with the devices in your Google Home ecosystem.
- What this means: Google is updating Gemini for Home, the version of its AI assistant for smart homes, with new camera-based automations.
- What this means: Google updates Gemini for Home with AI-powered camera automations Gemini can trigger smart home routines based on what your.

Nvidia Signals $150B Spend in Taiwan Speaking at a launch event for Nvidia's upcoming Taiwan headqua changes the whole.

Swipe for the full breakdown.

Nvidia Signals $150B Spend in Taiwan Speaking at a launch event for Nvidia's upcoming Taiwan headquarters, CEO Jensen Huang deemed the country the "epicenter" of the AI revolution Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said the AI chipmaker will spend up to $150 billion a year in Taiwan going forward. The company previously revealed plans for a $50 billion investment in.

- The company previously revealed plans for a $50 billion investment in AI in the U.S.
- The real shift here: Now, we're going to spend $100 billion, $150 billion in Taiwan each year." "Taiwan is the epicenter of.
- Keep an eye on this: The investment plans come as Taiwan takes an increased share of Nvidia's revenue, rising more than 50%.
- What this means: The annual $150 billion spend would be one of Nvidia's largest financial commitments to date.
- What this means: Dubbed Constellation, the site is anticipated to be open by 2030 and accommodate up to 4,000 employees.
